item.name: Island Onion Prince
item.description: With just a single exposure to the sunlight outside of your bag, this island Onion Prince shall be primed to bear you forth like the most flavorful of steeds.

mount.name: Island Onion Prince
mount.action: Summon forth your island Onion Prince, a vegetable whose colossal size befits his station.
mount.description: Royalty among mandragora, this island-bred Onion Prince knew every comfort growing up. Such a pampered life led to boredom, however, and he took to whiling away the days in mischief. Dismayed by his son's behavior, the king sent him off to squire for a renowned hero, that he might learn something of responsibility and leadership.
mount.tooltip:
By the onion, in my rambling
I forgot why I called you over!
- Bloezoeng
